# ManagedApplicationListCommand

**Device Management Command**

The command to get the status of all managed apps on a device.

## Declaration

```swift
object ManagedApplicationListCommand
```

## Objects

- **ManagedApplicationListCommand.Command**: The command to get the status of all managed apps on a device.

## Commands and responses

- **ManagedApplicationListResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to get the status of all managed apps on a device.
